# Plan: Comprehensive Bug Fix and Self-Test for IELTS Project

## Summary

Identify and fix all CSS, code, and logic bugs in the project, then run self-tests to verify correctness

## Tasks

1. Analyze CSS for Visual Bugs in src/styles and Component Styles
2. Analyze Code and Logic Bugs in src Directory (depends on: Analyze CSS for Visual Bugs in src/styles and Component Styles)
3. Fix All Identified CSS Bugs (depends on: Analyze CSS for Visual Bugs in src/styles and Component Styles)
4. Fix All Identified Code and Logic Bugs (depends on: Analyze Code and Logic Bugs in src Directory)
5. Run Full Self-Test Suite to Verify Bug Fixes (depends on: Fix All Identified CSS Bugs, Fix All Identified Code and Logic Bugs)
